scripts.setup: echo '=== Saturday Vinyl Hub Setup ===' && echo '1. Importing ESP-IDF environment...' && get_idf && echo '2. Detecting UART devices...' && ls -la /dev/cu.usbmodem* /dev/cu.usbserial* 2>/dev/null || echo 'No USB serial devices found - connect your ESP32-C6' && echo '3. Building firmware...' && idf.py build && echo '=== Setup complete! Ready to flash ==='
